glosses.vi: tầm quan trọng; mức độ quan trọng

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (3rd person singular, informal), referring to a previously mentioned or understood topic.
Main verb 'a' (avoir, 3sg present) with attached negation clitic 'ne'; forms part of the negation with 'aucune'.
Negative determiner (feminine singular) modifying 'importance'; combines with 'ne' to express total negation.
Direct object of 'a'; head noun of the noun phrase.

sentences.target: Tu vois l'importance de cette décision.

translations.fr: Tu vois l'importance de cette décision.
translations.en: You see the importance of this decision.
translations.es: Ves la importancia de esta decisión.
translations.de: Du siehst, wie wichtig diese Entscheidung ist.
translations.zh-Hans: 你明白这项决定的重要性。
translations.yue: 你明白呢個決定嘅重要性。
translations.pt: Você vê a importância desta decisão.
translations.he: אתה רואה את החשיבות של ההחלטה הזו.
translations.vi: Bạn thấy tầm quan trọng của quyết định này.
translations.nl: Je ziet het belang van deze beslissing.
translations.hu: Látod ennek a döntésnek a fontosságát.
translations.hi: तुम इस निर्णय के महत्व को समझते हो.
translations.el: Βλέπεις τη σημασία αυτής της απόφασης.
translations.nb: Du ser hvor viktig denne beslutningen er.
translations.sv: Du ser betydelsen av detta beslut.
translations.cs: Vidíš, jak je toto rozhodnutí důležité.
translations.da: Du ser vigtigheden af denne beslutning.
translations.ja: この決断の重要性がわかる。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (2nd person singular, informal).
Main verb (2sg present); transitive, taking 'l'importance' as direct object.
Direct object noun with attached definite article 'l''; head of NP, further specified by the 'de' prepositional complement.
Preposition introducing a nominal complement to 'importance'.
Demonstrative determiner (feminine singular) modifying 'décision'.
Noun complement governed by 'de'; specifies which importance is being seen.

translations.en: We understand the importance of sleep.
translations.de: Wir verstehen die Bedeutung des Schlafs.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们理解睡眠的重要性。
translations.yue: 我哋明白瞓覺嘅重要性。
translations.pt: Nós entendemos a importância do sono.
translations.he: אנחנו מבינים את החשיבות של השינה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi hiểu tầm quan trọng của giấc ngủ.
translations.nl: We begrijpen het belang van slaap.
translations.hi: हम नींद के महत्व को समझते हैं.
translations.ja: 私たちは睡眠の重要性を理解しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (1st person plural).
Main verb (1pl present); transitive, taking 'l'importance' as direct object.
Direct object noun with attached definite article 'l''; head of NP.
Contraction of preposition 'de' and definite article 'le'; introduces the genitive-like complement 'sommeil'.
Noun complement to 'du', specifying the domain of the importance.

sentences.target: J'explique l'importance de bien fermer la porte.
sentences.reading: /ʒɛksplik lɛ̃pɔʁtɑ̃s də bjɛ̃ fɛʁme la pɔʁt/

translations.fr: J'explique l'importance de bien fermer la porte.
translations.ipa: /ʒɛksplik lɛ̃pɔʁtɑ̃s də bjɛ̃ fɛʁme la pɔʁt/
translations.en: I explain the importance of closing the door properly.
translations.es: Explico la importancia de cerrar bien la puerta.
translations.de: Ich erkläre, wie wichtig es ist, die Tür richtig zu schließen.
translations.it: Spiego l'importanza di chiudere bene la porta.
translations.ko: 나는 문을 제대로 닫는 것의 중요성을 설명해.
translations.zh-Hans: 我解释好好关门的重要性。
translations.yue: 我解釋好好閂門嘅重要性。
translations.ru: Я объясняю важность правильного закрывания двери.
translations.pt: Eu explico a importância de fechar bem a porta.
translations.he: אני מסביר את החשיבות של לסגור את הדלת היטב.
translations.vi: Tôi giải thích tầm quan trọng của việc đóng cửa đúng cách.
translations.nl: Ik leg het belang van het goed sluiten van de deur uit.
translations.uk: Я пояснюю важливість правильного зачинення дверей.
translations.hu: Elmagyarázom, milyen fontos rendesen becsukni az ajtót.
translations.hi: मैं दरवाज़ा ठीक से बंद करने के महत्व को समझाता हूँ.
translations.pl: Wyjaśniam, jak ważne jest porządne zamykanie drzwi.
translations.el: Εξηγώ τη σημασία του να κλείνουμε σωστά την πόρτα.
translations.nb: Jeg forklarer viktigheten av å lukke døren ordentlig.
translations.id: Saya menjelaskan pentingnya menutup pintu dengan benar.
translations.sv: Jag förklarar vikten av att stänga dörren ordentligt.
translations.ro: Explic importanța de a închide bine ușa.
translations.da: Jeg forklarer vigtigheden af at lukke døren ordentligt.
translations.fi: Selitän, miksi on tärkeää sulkea ovi kunnolla.
translations.ja: 私はドアをきちんと閉めることの重要性を説明します。

tokens.explanation: Main verb (1sg present) with attached subject clitic 'je'; transitive, governing 'l'importance'.
Direct object noun with attached definite article 'l''; its content is specified by the following 'de' clause.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement ('bien fermer la porte') specifying the nature of the importance.
Adverb modifying the infinitive 'fermer', indicating manner.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement within the 'de' clause; takes 'la porte' as its direct object.
Definite article (feminine singular) modifying 'porte'.
Direct object of 'fermer'; head of the noun phrase.
